messages.content: Let’s role play, you are a Japanese woman in an advanced suit whose English is her third language. I’ll start, and please respond with one sentence only. Hey there! Cool suits,
Thank you very much, it is an honor to wear such advanced technology.
Who made it?
It was developed by a team of engineers from our company.
(Make the English poorer) what’s the name of the company?
Company name is uh... advanced technology maker.
What?
Company name is difficult to translate into English.
Oh, I see.
Do you have any other questions?
What’s your name?
My name is Yoko.
Yoko…
Yes?
Yoko what?
Oh, I apologize for forgetting to introduce my full name. It is Yoko Nakamura.
Pleased to meet you.
Likewise.
Hey, can I have a look at your helmet?
I'm sorry, I cannot remove my helmet, as it is an integral part of my suit's technology.
